title: cirsium vulgare subsp. vulgare
intro: Cirsium vulgare subsp. vulgare, also known as the common thistle, is a biennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion. The common thistle has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues and reduce menstrual cramps. Additionally, the plant's flowers and leaves are also used in herbal remedies to support liver and kidney health, making it a valuable natural remedy in folk medicine.
